title: Welcome to Netrajyoti Eye Hospital
heading: Welcome to Netrajyoti
text: Welcome to  Netrajyoti Eye Hospital Helpline No.  03473-356034/356035 For Appointment   +91 7001985950, +91 7001985951 Request Appointment Request An Appointment Find Doctor Find a Doctor Like Us Like Us on Facebook 118/1,Mission Road, Ranaghat 741201,Nadia, W.B. Everyday 8AM TO 5PM Home About Foundation Eye Hostpital Services Accommodation Ground Floor First Floor Second Floor Third and Fourth Floor Gallery Image Gallery Video Gallery Doctor Tips Blog Contact slide1 slide2 Departments The Backbone of our Clinic More Medical Services A list of all available More Find a doctor All our staff by department More Request an appointment Call us or fill in a form More Welcome to Netrajyoti Netrajyoti Eye Hospital is a dream comes true. It was a dream nurtured by a Retina fellow of Dr. S.S.Badrinath, founder & mentor of Sankara Nethralaya, Chennai.The dream had to be nurtured by the fellow in his mind for one and half decade to make it a reality . This fellow is none other than Dr. Pradip Mohanta. After 6 years of good private practice, following the footsteps of Dr. S.S.Badrinath, Dr. Pradip left his private practice and formed a public charitable trust in 2000 named Netrajyoti Eye Reserch Foundation. People encouraging, helping, co-operating and keeping the moral high in the mind for this sacrifice are Dr. Amitava Biswas, Mr. R.P. Mukherjee, Mrs. Dipali Mohanta, Mr. Uttam Mohanta, Mr. Sudip Biswas, Mr. Shubhendu Chakraborty, Mr. Anil Kr. Mohanta and Mrs. Renuka Mohanta. Our World Class Services CATARACT SERVICES Biometry SICS Cold Phaco+ Foldable IOL Phaco + Multifocal IOL Microphaco YAG Laser Capsulotomy GLAUCOMA SERVICES WI-care Tonometry (Finland) Humphrey Auto Perimetry Gonioscopy YAG Laser Iridotomy Trabeculectomy RNFL analysis & CCT by OCT RETINA SERVICES Indirect Ophthalmoscopy Ophthalmoscopy DFA (Topcon, Japan) OCT(Optovue, USA) USG Vitrectomy by Accurus, Alcon, USA Retinal Detachment Surgery Green Laser Retinal photocoagulation (Slit lamp, Endolaser) Retinal Cryopexy Intravitreal Avastin injection OTHER SERVICES Surgery by Leica Microscope, Switzerland & Moller- Wedel Microscope, Germany Squint Surgery Othoptic Exercises Oculoplastic Surgery Pterygiun Surgery DCT DCR Testimonials " Tanmay Ghosh " : Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmodtempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
